source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Water in a piston/cylinder is at 101 kPa, 25\circ\text{C}, and mass 0.5 kg. The piston rests on some stops, and the pressure should be 1000 kPa to float the piston. We now heat the water, so the piston just reaches the end of the cylinder. Find the heat transfer.
